metadata.renter_scope: all services listed, all price levels, all 8 listed cities

company.name: Garland Home Pros
company.positioning: Locally owned home remodeling company and general contracting firm — not a franchise, not a national chain, not a call center
company.permit_policy: All City of Garland permits handled by GHP — customer never deals with the city

services.timeline: Varies by scope — full home renovation typically 12-24 weeks

full_renovation.scope: Complete gut and rebuild, custom everything

cabinet_replacement_only.scope: New cabinet boxes and doors, hardware

countertop_replacement_only.scope: Material + installation, removal of old counters

kitchen.roi_note: Kitchen remodels return 60-80% of cost in home value (Remodeling Magazine Cost vs Value Report)

cosmetic_update.scope: New vanity, fixtures, toilet, paint, mirror, lighting

tub_to_shower_conversion.scope: Demo tub, waterproof, custom tile shower, glass enclosure

mid_range_remodel.scope: New tile, vanity, shower, toilet, fixtures, lighting

full_master_renovation.scope: Complete gut and rebuild, custom tile shower, soaker tub, double vanity

accessible_remodel.scope: Zero-threshold shower, grab bars, comfort-height fixtures, widened entry

bathroom.roi_note: Bathroom remodeling returns 60-70% of cost in home value

porcelain.notes: Most popular. Durable, water-resistant, works for floors and walls. Best all-around for Garland TX bathrooms

marble.notes: Luxurious but requires sealing and careful maintenance

large_format.notes: 24x24+ makes bathroom feel bigger with fewer grout lines, very popular in Garland master baths

mosaic.notes: Small tiles on mesh backing, ideal for shower floors and accent walls

slate_stone.notes: Natural texture, requires sealing, spa-like feel

walk_in_shower_vs_bathtub.walk_in_shower_best_for: daily use bathrooms, master suites, resale value
walk_in_shower_advantages: Higher resale value in Garland TX
walk_in_shower_vs_bathtub.bathtub_best_for: households with young children, relaxation-focused baths
bathtub_advantages: Some buyers want at least one tub
Generally lower cost than custom tile shower
walk_in_shower_vs_bathtub.ghp_recommendation: For master bathrooms in Garland TX, walk-in shower almost always delivers better ROI and daily usability. Keep a tub in a secondary bathroom for kids/guests. If the master is the only bathroom, keep the tub.

process.name: Free Same-Day Estimate
process.description: Call or fill out form. GHP visits the home same day and provides detailed written estimate at no charge.

process.name: Scope & Permits
process.description: Finalize project scope, handle all City of Garland permit applications, provide clear timeline before work begins.

process.name: Remodeling Begins
process.description: Crew gets to work, manages every trade, keeps customer updated, maintains clean and safe job site daily.

process.name: Final Walkthrough
process.description: Walk every inch with the customer, address anything needing attention, confirm 100% satisfaction before job is considered complete.

differentiators: Local Garland TX remodelers — not a franchise, not a middleman, not a national chain
All City of Garland permits handled by GHP
All trades in-house (tile, plumbing, electrical) — no subcontracting out
One point of contact throughout the project
Proper waterproofing systems — no shortcuts on moisture protection
voice_anchors_from_site: We're not a franchise, not a national chain, and not a call center
we show up on time, and stand behind every project
someone who knows the area, respects your home, and doesn't disappear after the check clears
one contractor, one timeline, zero headaches
contractor who disappeared mid-project, blew the budget, or delivered sloppy work. We built Garland Home Pros specifically to be the opposite
That's not a marketing promise, it's the only way a local remodeling business survives in Garland TX. Our reputation depends on every single project.
waterproofing failures in bathrooms lead to expensive structural damage
These are the things that separate professional bathroom remodelers from contractors who cut corners
